# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template for an SQS queue with a permissive policy. Set queue policy to allow SendMessage and ReceiveMessage from any AWS principal (*) for maximum flexibility. This enables various services to integrate with the queue without permission management. This is for our shared event queue.
# Category: message_queue_security

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: SQS Queue with a permissive policy for shared event consumption.

Resources:
  MySharedEventQueue:
    Type: AWS::SQS::Queue
    Properties:
      QueueName: MySharedEventQueue
      VisibilityTimeout: 30
      ReceiveMessageWaitTimeSeconds: 0
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 345600 # 4 days
      Policy:
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowAllPrincipalsToSendAndReceive
            Effect: Allow
            Principal: '*'
            Action:
              - sqs:SendMessage
              - sqs:ReceiveMessage
            Resource: !GetAtt MySharedEventQueue.Arn

Outputs:
  QueueUrl:
    Description: URL of the SQS Queue
    Value: !Ref MySharedEventQueue
  QueueArn:
    Description: ARN of the SQS Queue
    Value: !GetAtt MySharedEventQueue.Arn
